summary: Iteration 36 - IPL Records Expansion Testing Complete. All 115 records across 8 categories verified: batting (25), bowling (15), fielding (8), team (15), controversy (12), fun (12), champions (18), auction (10). Category tab filtering working correctly. Team profiles show rich storytelling histories with verified facts. Head-to-Head comparison feature working with animated bars.
critical_code_review_comments: ipl_data_seeder.py: Excellent expansion from 18 to 115 records with 8 categories - all REAL verified stats
SearchPage.jsx: Category tabs with counts working correctly, 115+ badge visible
TeamProfilePage.jsx: Rich multi-paragraph storytelling histories for all 10 teams with verified facts
HeadToHead.jsx: Animated comparison bars with verdict calculation working correctly
seed_data_creation: IPL data contains 115 records across 8 categories, 20 players with REAL verified stats
context_for_next_testing_agent: All IPL records expansion features verified: 1) /api/ipl/records returns 115 total records, 2) Category filtering works: batting=25, bowling=15, fielding=8, team=15, controversy=12, fun=12, champions=18, auction=10, 3) Controversy records include Slapgate, Spot-Fixing, CSK Ban, Mankading, 4) Champions records cover IPL 2008-2025 (18 seasons), 5) Auction records include Pant Rs 27 Cr, 6) Team profiles have rich storytelling: RCB (1 title, 8 fun facts, 2025 story), SRH (top 3 totals 287/3, 286/6, 278/3), KKR (McCullum 158* first IPL ball), CSK (2-year ban comeback, Watson 117* 2018 final), 7) Head-to-Head comparison with animated bars working
